event.name: Spring Builder Showcase
event.tagline: Drop the links. Activate the panel. Spotlight the winners.

dimensions.name: Innovation
dimensions.description: Originality and a thoughtful approach to the challenge

dimensions.name: Potential Impact
dimensions.description: Value for people using the project

dimensions.name: Clarity and Demo
dimensions.description: How clearly the project and its value are communicated

review_lenses.name: Innovation lens
review_lenses.focus: originality, problem framing, and useful creative choices

review_lenses.name: Build quality lens
review_lenses.focus: technical execution, completeness, and thoughtful implementation

review_lenses.name: Impact lens
review_lenses.focus: user value, feasibility, and the strength of the demo story

awards.name: Boldest Idea
awards.tagline: For the project that took the most original swing.
awards.reason: This project stood out for originality, thoughtful problem framing, and a bold approach.

awards.name: Most Useful
awards.tagline: For the project with the clearest path to helping people.
awards.reason: This project stood out for practical value and a clear path to helping its intended users.

awards.name: Project of the Showcase
awards.tagline: The strongest complete project across the full review.
awards.reason: This project delivered the strongest overall result across the event rubric.
